title: GridX Price Detail
description: A single interval's price detail, containing the composite price and its components.

startIntervalTimeStamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the start of this interval (e.g. '2025-03-01T00:00:00-0800').

intervalPrice.description: Total interval price (sum of components) as a decimal string in $/kWh.

priceComponents.description: Exactly three price components: cld, mec, and mgcc.
